title: Resolution
description: A resolution, report, or set of minutes produced by the Staten Island Borough Board or the Borough President's office. The Borough Board (the BP, the borough's council members, and the community board chairs) meets monthly and issues resolutions and reports on borough-wide matters. NET-NEW as data: these appear only as monthly PDFs on statenislandusa.com/borough-board.html — no dataset, no API. Modeled from the published meeting archive.

meetingDate.description: Date of the Borough Board meeting.

summary.description: Short description of the matter addressed.

relatedApplicationId.description: Related ULURP / land-use application, if any.
